Class State

java.lang.Object
Controller.State
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbandonedShipCrewRemovalState, AbandonedShipDecidingState, AbandonedStationDecidingState, AbandonedStationLandState, BuildingState, ChoosePlanetState, CombatZone1_E_BatteryRemovalState, CombatZone1_P_BatteryRemovalState, CombatZone1CannonShotsState, CombatZone1CheckShipState, CombatZone1CrewRemovalState, CombatZone1EngineDeclarationState, CombatZone1ManageShotState, CombatZone1PowerDeclarationState, CombatZone2_E_BatteryRemovalState, CombatZone2_P_BatteryRemovalState, CombatZone2CannonShotsState, CombatZone2CheckShipState, CombatZone2EngineDeclarationState, CombatZone2GoodsRemovalState, CombatZone2ManageShotState, CombatZone2PowerDeclarationState, FixShipState, FlightPhase, HourGlassFinishedState, LogInState, ManageMeteorState, MeteorsCheckShipState, MeteorsState, OffState, OpenSpaceBatteryRemovalState, OpenSpaceEngineDeclarationState, PiratesBatteryRemovalState, PiratesCannonShotsState, PiratesCheckShipState, PiratesManageShotState, PiratesPowerDeclarationState, PiratesRewardState, PlaceAlienState, PlanetsLandState, RewardsPhase, SecondCombatZone2BatteryRemovalState, SecondSmugglersBatteryRemovalState, SlaversBatteryRemovalState, SlaversCrewRemovalState, SlaversPowerDeclarationState, SlaversRewardsState, SmugglersBatteryRemovalState, SmugglersGoodsRemovalState, SmugglersLandState, SmugglersPowerDeclarationState
public abstract class State extends Object implements Serializable
Abstract class representing the state of the game. Each state defines the behavior of the game at a specific point in time. It provides methods for handling player actions and transitions between states.
See Also:
